name: MinerU Extractor
description: External MinerU material extractor wrapper for URL extraction into Markdown retrieved from the bounded result archive; local-file upload request construction is exposed as a wrapper contract for host-mediated integration.
author: Paper Search fixtures

endpoint.label: MinerU API base URL
endpoint.description: Base URL for the MinerU API.

modelVersion.description: MinerU model_version: auto, pipeline, vlm, or MinerU-HTML.

language.description: MinerU language option; defaults to the official wrapper value.

enableTable.description: Map to MinerU enable_table when explicitly configured; otherwise omit it like the official wrapper.

enableFormula.description: Map to MinerU enable_formula when explicitly configured; otherwise omit it like the official wrapper.

maxResultZipBytes.description: Maximum decoded MinerU result ZIP size.

pollIntervalMs.description: Default poll interval for live extraction.

cache.description: Whether the provider may reuse provider-scoped cache entries.
